message:
data(audit): record obligation, sync, I/O, codec, capability type audits (all SOUND)

Session total: 158 files, ~280K lines. 9 bugs fixed:
- CORS CRLF injection (CRITICAL)
- H1 chunked whitespace smuggling (HIGH)
- MPSC lost wakeup (HIGH)
- MPSC stale waiter panic (MEDIUM)
- Fault channel stat corruption (MEDIUM)
- Diagnostics cycle_nodes overflow (MEDIUM)
- JetStream double-ack (MEDIUM)
- DNS negative TTL unclamped (MEDIUM)
- MySQL pool leak (MINOR)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
